results.rendered_html:
prakāśin (von prakāśa) adj.
1〉 hell, leuchtend: sūryā yasmiṃstu sauvarṇāḥ prakāśante prakāśinaḥ  MBH. 4,1353 . jvalanasamiddhavapuḥ˚ 1,1434 . śarāmbudhārau samare śastravidyutprakāśinau 8,603 . 6,3100 .  HARIV. 13460 . vidyutsamaprakāśinī (netre)  R. 6,37,67 . a˚ unsichtbar  MBH. 13,1075 .
— 2〉 anʼs Licht bringend, offenbar machend: āditya iva bhūtānāṃ śrīrguṇānāṃ prakāśinī  Spr. 3120 .
